<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-268" location="lines:268-272" -->
```bash
   curl -X POST http://localhost:2975/v2/packages \
     -H "Content-Type: application/octet-stream" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $USER_ADMIN_TOKEN" \
     --data-binary @./daml/licensing/.daml/dist/quickstart-licensing-0.0.1.dar

```
